examples: They were a holy lot, with the emphasis on hellfire and damnation.
The problem, the sources say, is the Hellfire can be too powerful.
"Hellfire and Herring" is a masterly work that enlivens the past with beauty and emotion, yet never sags into soft-focus sentimentality.
The Dutch had dispatched an Apache helicopter to destroy the abandoned pickup with a Hellfire missile.
Their fiery prophets threaten them with hellfire and eternal damnation if they do not repent and change their ways.
